case_title: LARESA BROWN VS. ANGELO CAPOZZI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF BROWN, LARESA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-09-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, LARESA

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-11-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF LARESA BROWN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, LARESA AS TO DEFENDANT CAPOZZI, ANGELO DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-09-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-07-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-17-2014
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, LARESA HEARING SET FOR DEC-11-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, LARESA
FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF COMPLAINT BY PLAINTIFF LARESA BROWN ON 11/8/13 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
